title: All you need: cozy session
description: this modpack is made for those cozy afternoon Minecraft sessions! And also keeping it decently lightweight with all the comfiest mods.
body:
**All You Need: Cozy Sessions** is the perfect modpack for those comfy Minecraft afternoons. It’s designed to be the most lightweight possible while enhancing the cozy vibe with carefully chosen mods.

Explore **beautifully** generated worlds with Terralith, enjoy smooth gameplay thanks to performance mods like Sodium, and take advantage of helpful utility mods like Easy Anvils and enchanting. Subtle camera tweaks and aesthetic shaders, paired with cozy resource packs, give your world that warm, **trailer-like feel**. Plenty of comfort-focused mods enhance the atmosphere, making every sunset, rainfall, and quiet moment **feel just right**.

Whether you’re building a charming cottage, tending to a peaceful farm, or simply relaxing by the fire, **this modpack** has everything you need for a soothing Minecraft experience.
